title: Methods and unmanned aerial vehicles for longer duration flights
abstract: An unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) (100) for a long duration flight includes a UAV body assembly(110) and a flight control system (FCS) (120) coupled to the UAV body assembly(110). The UAV(100) may further include a motor(150) coupled to the UAV body assembly(110) at one end and coupled to a propeller(130) at the other end. The FCS(120) is communicatively connected to the motor(150). A center of gravity (CG) (115) of the UAV is at a point between 21% and 25% of a mean aerodynamic chord (MAC) of the UAV(100).
